user.title: Add Novatek device
user.description: Select a discovered Novatek device on your local network, then enter its password.

discovery_confirm.title: Add discovered Novatek device
discovery_confirm.description: Found a Novatek device at {host}. Enter its password to add it.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the selected device. Check network reachability.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid password (or this is not a supported Novatek device).

abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured compatible Novatek devices were found on the local network. Devices discovered via DHCP will appear automatically in Settings > Devices & Services.
